explanation: This zone near Upparpet/Elite Junction scores 82.4/100 on the Congestion Impact Index — placing it in the CRITICAL band. The primary driver is lane blockage: double parking and main-road violations account for 85% of the lane capacity loss, blocking an estimated 22.5 lane-hours per day. During the 9 AM morning peak, junction throughput at Elite Junction drops significantly as parked vehicles obstruct turning movements. MapMyIndia traffic data confirms this — travel times through this corridor are 1.7x the city average during peak hours, independently validating the high congestion risk. Immediate enforcement focus recommended during 08:00–11:00 IST with priority on double-parked vehicles blocking the arterial approach.
